name: OpenAI Model System Cards
description: OpenAI Model System Cards — pre-deployment documentation of model capabilities, limitations, safety evaluations, mitigations, and residual risk assessments. Published with major model releases (GPT-4, GPT-4o, o1, etc.). Note: companion reference/openai.com/system-cards/ holds specific model system cards as published documents.
relationToAISecurity: Standard AI-transparency artifact for major model releases; companion to model cards as a documentation pattern.
